info.title: Seren Models
info.description: Run public model chat completions through seren-models.

body.description:
Response body (JSON if available, raw text for textual upstreams, or null
when body_base64 is set)

body_base64.description:
Raw binary response body, base64-encoded. Present only when the upstream
returned a non-JSON, non-text payload. When set, `body` is null.

content_type.description: Upstream Content-Type for a base64-encoded binary response body.

cost.description: Actual cost charged in configured asset

oneOf.description: Optional cost breakdown (target + service fee) when a service fee is charged.

response_bytes.description: Size of the publisher response body in bytes (raw, before JSON parsing).

CostBreakdown.description: Cost breakdown when a service fee is charged (e.g., pre-authorization or geo-proxy routing).

target.description: Cost charged for the target API

body.description:
Response body (JSON if available, raw text for textual upstreams, or null
when body_base64 is set)

body_base64.description:
Raw binary response body, base64-encoded. Present only when the upstream
returned a non-JSON, non-text payload. When set, `body` is null.

content_type.description: Upstream Content-Type for a base64-encoded binary response body.

cost.description: Actual cost charged in configured asset

oneOf.description: Optional cost breakdown (target + service fee) when a service fee is charged.

response_bytes.description: Size of the publisher response body in bytes (raw, before JSON parsing).

count.description: Number of items in this response

has_more.description: Whether there are more items after this page

total.description: Total number of items across all pages
